From Gabrielle Nutt’s stable tour to a $2.8 million Magic Millions purchase, The Next Episode has quickly transformed Phil Cunningham’s Australian adventure into a potential Coolmore Stud Stakes campaign.

As workforce shortages continue to challenge industries across Australia, TBA has emerged as a key driver of education, recruitment and career pathways, with Meagan McGrath outlining how the organisation is focused on attracting young people into breeding.

The Australian Thoroughbred racing and breeding industry’s best people were recognised on Monday night at the 2026 Australian Thoroughbred Industry Employee Awards, held at the Sheraton Grand Mirage Resort on the Gold Coast.

Romantic Warrior’s gallant win in the G1 Champions & Chater Cup at Sha Tin on Sunday meant he is only the third horse to sweep the Hong Kong Triple Crown. His trainer Danny Shum had a double on the card to extend his lead in the Trainer’s Premiership battle.

A day after Gstaad won the G1 Irish 2000 Guineas, Starspangledbanner made it a Guineas double as Precise took out the filly’s version at The Curragh. In Japan, history was made when jockey Seina Imamura became the first Japanese woman to ride a Group 1 winner there.

Confidence in the next wave of stallions was on full display at the Magic Millions National Weanling Sale, where fierce competition for progeny by emerging sires - led by a $680,000 daughter of Home Affairs - helped sustain a remarkably consistent market despite a smaller catalogue and fewer six-figure lots.

The top end of the Magic Millions National Weanling Sale delivered no shortage of fireworks, with fierce bidding around elite sire power, rare offerings and deep commercial pedigrees pushing four youngsters to $400,000 or more.

At the Magic Millions Gold Coast National Weanling Sale, TTR AusNZ uncovered a 'value buy' - an opportunity that a shrewd purchaser had snapped up. Trainer Simon Miller has had a decade of success buying weanlings at the Gold Coast and he hopes a daughter of Trapeze Artist can continue the trend.
